title: neocussonia umbellifera
intro: Neocussonia umbellifera, also known as the umbrella plant, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family of plants known as Apiaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to act as a natural diuretic and to help reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Neocussonia umbellifera include its potential to alleviate symptoms of urinary tract infections, kidney stones, and other kidney-related issues, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and reduce the risk of cardiovascular disease. Neocussonia umbellifera can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for its medicinal purposes, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
